heading: Application
label: 30702 Application
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)30702(a)(no source).30702(b)46 App.:195., .Feb. 13, 1893, ch. 105, § 727 Stat. 446Subsection (a) is added based on language appearing in various source provisions restated in this chapter. The word “carriage” is substituted for “transporting”, and the word “goods” is substituted for “merchandise or property”, to use the same terminology as in the Carriage of Goods By Sea Act (, ). The words “to or from any port in the United States” are substituted for “from or between ports of the United States and foreign ports” in 46 App. U.S.C. 190 and 193, “from or between ports of the United States of America and foreign ports” in 46 App. U.S.C. 191, and “to or from any port in the United States of America” in 46 App. U.S.C. 192, for clarity and consistency. See , 179 U.S. 69 (1900).Apr. 16, 1936, ch. 22949 Stat. 1207Knott v. Botany Mills

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, this chapter applies to a carrier engaged in the carriage of goods to or from any port in the United States.

children.heading: .—Live Animals
children.label: b .—Live Animals
children.text: Sections 30703 and 30704 of this title do not apply to the carriage of live animals.
